Solutions for RWAs

We help societies become EV-ready.

From initial power planning to automated resident billing splits, EBEECHARGE manages the complete charging ecosystem for housing societies.

Make Your Society EV-Ready →
Chapter 01

The Electric Shift is Already Here.

EV adoption is increasing exponentially. More residents are bringing electric vehicles home every month. Yet most housing societies are not prepared. Standard building electrical main lines were never built to handle dozens of vehicles drawing high power simultaneously.

Chapter 02

What RWA Committees Face

Resident Requests

Dozens of individual applications requesting permission to install custom chargers, with committees unsure how to allocate common area wall slots safely.

Billing Disputes

Arguments over common area power utilization. Tracking who charged how much, and dealing with manual math on slab utility split invoices.

Infrastructure Limitations

Grid overload risks. Connecting multiple chargers directly to resident meters or transformer lines threatens to trip main building breakers during evening peaks.

Management Complexity

Committee members volunteering their free time do not have the hours to manually audit meter logs, collect cash, and handle disputes.

Chapter 03

The EBEE Complete Solution

We integrate smart hardware safety panels and automated tracking software into one seamless platform.

Smart DB

The dynamic load balancer. Connects multiple bays and schedules power cycles dynamically to prevent localized main breaker trips.

QR Charging

No complicated mobile app installations or logins. Residents scan the QR code at their slot, configure, and charge via browser.

WhatsApp Updates

Live notifications pushed straight to the resident's phone: when session starts, peak status, and completion billing.

Dashboard Visibility

Separate administrative console for RWA members to track sessions, download ledgers, and audit payouts instantly.

Chapter 04

The Resident Journey

A seamless, frictionless experience designed to get cars charged with zero hassle.

01

Arrive

Park the EV in your allocated residential bay.

02

Scan QR

Scan the unique QR code printed on the charger node casing.

03

Charge

Plug in the cable; the session initiates safely via web browser.

04

Track

Monitor live power draws and kW duration progress on your phone.

05

Bill Pushed

Receive payment receipt automatically via WhatsApp and email.

06

Leave

Unplug and drive away, with the bay ready for the next session.

Chapter 05

The Society Admin Journey

RWA committees get total control over parameters without chasing residents for payments.

01

Monitor Usage

Track active charger loads and grid status cycles in real time.

02

Track Sessions

View total active units drawn, session durations, and user IDs.

03

Review Billing

Receipt funds clear automatically. Payouts route directly to RWA accounts.

04

Manage Access

Lock specific slots for private residents or keep them open for guests.

05

Generate Reports

Download complete monthly slab ledger spreadsheets with one click.

Chapter 06

Build an EV-ready community today.

Give your property residents the premium amenity they expect. Prevent future disputes, stabilize your building power grid, and automate splits.
